heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 1836 Authorization of appropriations

children.label: a
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, $10,000,000 for fiscal year 2009 and such sums as may be necessary for each of the five succeeding fiscal years.

children.label: b
children.text: Any funds appropriated pursuant to subsection (a) are authorized to remain available until expended.
